1<?php
2
3namespace Github;
4
5use Github\Api\AbstractApi;
6use Github\Exception\BadMethodCallException;
7use Github\Exception\InvalidArgumentException;
8use Github\HttpClient\Builder;
9use Github\HttpClient\Plugin\Authentication;
10use Github\HttpClient\Plugin\GithubExceptionThrower;
11use Github\HttpClient\Plugin\History;
12use Github\HttpClient\Plugin\PathPrepend;
13use Http\Client\Common\HttpMethodsClientInterface;
14use Http\Client\Common\Plugin;
15use Http\Discovery\Psr17FactoryDiscovery;
16use Psr\Cache\CacheItemPoolInterface;
17use Psr\Http\Client\ClientInterface;
18use Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface;
19
20/**
21 * Simple yet very cool PHP GitHub client.
22 *
23 * @method Api\CurrentUser                       currentUser()
24 * @method Api\CurrentUser                       me()
25 * @method Api\Enterprise                        ent()
26 * @method Api\Enterprise                        enterprise()
27 * @method Api\Miscellaneous\CodeOfConduct       codeOfConduct()
28 * @method Api\Miscellaneous\Emojis              emojis()
29 * @method Api\Miscellaneous\Licenses            licenses()
30 * @method Api\GitData                           git()
31 * @method Api\GitData                           gitData()
32 * @method Api\Gists                             gist()
33 * @method Api\Gists                             gists()
34 * @method Api\Miscellaneous\Gitignore           gitignore()
35 * @method Api\Apps                              apps()
36 * @method Api\Issue                             issue()
37 * @method Api\Issue                             issues()
38 * @method Api\Markdown                          markdown()
39 * @method Api\Notification                      notification()
40 * @method Api\Notification                      notifications()
41 * @method Api\Organization                      organization()
42 * @method Api\Organization                      organizations()
43 * @method Api\Organization\Projects             orgProject()
44 * @method Api\Organization\Projects             orgProjects()
45 * @method Api\Organization\Projects             organizationProject()
46 * @method Api\Organization\Projects             organizationProjects()
47 * @method Api\Organization\OutsideCollaborators outsideCollaborators()
48 * @method Api\PullRequest                       pr()
49 * @method Api\PullRequest                       pullRequest()
50 * @method Api\PullRequest                       pullRequests()
51 * @method Api\RateLimit                         rateLimit()
52 * @method Api\Repo                              repo()
53 * @method Api\Repo                              repos()
54 * @method Api\Repo                              repository()
55 * @method Api\Repo                              repositories()
56 * @method Api\Search                            search()
57 * @method Api\Organization\Teams                team()
58 * @method Api\Organization\Teams                teams()
59 * @method Api\User                              user()
60 * @method Api\User                              users()
61 * @method Api\Authorizations                    authorization()
62 * @method Api\Authorizations                    authorizations()
63 * @method Api\Meta                              meta()
64 * @method Api\GraphQL                           graphql()
65 * @method Api\Deployment                        deployment()
66 * @method Api\Deployment                        deployments()
67 *
68 * @author Joseph Bielawski <stloyd@gmail.com>
69 *
70 * Website: http://github.com/KnpLabs/php-github-api
71 */
72class Client
73{
74    /**
75     * Authenticate using a client_id/client_secret combination.
76     *
77     * @var string
78     *
79     * @deprecated Use the AuthMethod const
80     */
81    const AUTH_CLIENT_ID = AuthMethod::CLIENT_ID;
82
83    /**
84     * Authenticate using a GitHub access token.
85     *
86     * @var string
87     *
88     * @deprecated Use the AuthMethod const
89     */
90    const AUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN = AuthMethod::ACCESS_TOKEN;
91
92    /**
93     * Constant for authentication method.
94     *
95     * Indicates JSON Web Token authentication required for GitHub apps access
96     * to the API.
97     *
98     * @var string
99     *
100     * @deprecated Use the AuthMethod const
101     */
102    const AUTH_JWT = AuthMethod::JWT;
103
104    /**
105     * @var string
106     */
107    private $apiVersion;
108
109    /**
110     * @var Builder
111     */
112    private $httpClientBuilder;
113
114    /**
115     * @var History
116     */
117    private $responseHistory;
118
119    /**
120     * Instantiate a new GitHub client.
121     *
122     * @param Builder|null $httpClientBuilder
123     * @param string|null  $apiVersion
124     * @param string|null  $enterpriseUrl
125     */
126    public function __construct(?Builder $httpClientBuilder = null, $apiVersion = null, $enterpriseUrl = null)
127    {
128        $this->responseHistory = new History();
129        $this->httpClientBuilder = $builder = $httpClientBuilder ?? new Builder();
130        $this->apiVersion = $apiVersion ?: 'v3';
131
132        $builder->addPlugin(new GithubExceptionThrower());
133        $builder->addPlugin(new Plugin\HistoryPlugin($this->responseHistory));
134        $builder->addPlugin(new Plugin\RedirectPlugin());
135        $builder->addPlugin(new Plugin\AddHostPlugin(Psr17FactoryDiscovery::findUriFactory()->createUri('https://api.github.com')));
136        $builder->addPlugin(new Plugin\HeaderDefaultsPlugin([
137            'User-Agent' => 'php-github-api (http://github.com/KnpLabs/php-github-api)',
138            'Accept' => sprintf('application/vnd.github.%s+json', $this->apiVersion),
139        ]));
140
141        if ($enterpriseUrl) {
142            $this->setEnterpriseUrl($enterpriseUrl);
143        }
144    }
145
146    /**
147     * Create a Github\Client using a HTTP client.
148     *
149     * @param ClientInterface $httpClient
150     *
151     * @return Client
152     */
153    public static function createWithHttpClient(ClientInterface $httpClient): self
154    {
155        $builder = new Builder($httpClient);
156
157        return new self($builder);
158    }
159
160    /**
161     * @param string $name
162     *
163     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
164     *
165     * @return AbstractApi
166     */
167    public function api($name): AbstractApi
168    {
169        switch ($name) {
170            case 'me':
171            case 'current_user':
172            case 'currentUser':
173                $api = new Api\CurrentUser($this);
174                break;
175            case 'codeOfConduct':
176                $api = new Api\Miscellaneous\CodeOfConduct($this);
177                break;
178
179            case 'deployment':
180            case 'deployments':
181                $api = new Api\Deployment($this);
182                break;
183
184            case 'ent':
185            case 'enterprise':
186                $api = new Api\Enterprise($this);
187                break;
188
189            case 'emojis':
190                $api = new Api\Miscellaneous\Emojis($this);
191                break;
192
193            case 'git':
194            case 'git_data':
195            case 'gitData':
196                $api = new Api\GitData($this);
197                break;
198
199            case 'gist':
200            case 'gists':
201                $api = new Api\Gists($this);
202                break;
203
204            case 'gitignore':
205                $api = new Api\Miscellaneous\Gitignore($this);
206                break;
207
208            case 'apps':
209                $api = new Api\Apps($this);
210                break;
211
212            case 'issue':
213            case 'issues':
214                $api = new Api\Issue($this);
215                break;
216
217            case 'markdown':
218                $api = new Api\Markdown($this);
219                break;
220
221            case 'licenses':
222                $api = new Api\Miscellaneous\Licenses($this);
223                break;
224
225            case 'notification':
226            case 'notifications':
227                $api = new Api\Notification($this);
228                break;
229
230            case 'organization':
231            case 'organizations':
232                $api = new Api\Organization($this);
233                break;
234
235            case 'org_project':
236            case 'orgProject':
237            case 'org_projects':
238            case 'orgProjects':
239            case 'organization_project':
240            case 'organizationProject':
241            case 'organization_projects':
242            case 'organizationProjects':
243                $api = new Api\Organization\Projects($this);
244                break;
245
246            case 'pr':
247            case 'pulls':
248            case 'pullRequest':
249            case 'pull_request':
250            case 'pullRequests':
251            case 'pull_requests':
252                $api = new Api\PullRequest($this);
253                break;
254
255            case 'rateLimit':
256            case 'rate_limit':
257                $api = new Api\RateLimit($this);
258                break;
259
260            case 'repo':
261            case 'repos':
262            case 'repository':
263            case 'repositories':
264                $api = new Api\Repo($this);
265                break;
266
267            case 'search':
268                $api = new Api\Search($this);
269                break;
270
271            case 'team':
272            case 'teams':
273                $api = new Api\Organization\Teams($this);
274                break;
275
276            case 'member':
277            case 'members':
278                $api = new Api\Organization\Members($this);
279                break;
280
281            case 'user':
282            case 'users':
283                $api = new Api\User($this);
284                break;
285
286            case 'authorization':
287            case 'authorizations':
288                $api = new Api\Authorizations($this);
289                break;
290
291            case 'meta':
292                $api = new Api\Meta($this);
293                break;
294
295            case 'graphql':
296                $api = new Api\GraphQL($this);
297                break;
298
299            case 'outsideCollaborators':
300            case 'outside_collaborators':
301                $api = new Api\Organization\OutsideCollaborators($this);
302                break;
303
304            case 'copilotUsage':
305            case 'copilot_usage':
306                $api = new Api\Copilot\Usage($this);
307                break;
308
309            default:
310                throw new InvalidArgumentException(sprintf('Undefined api instance called: "%s"', $name));
311        }
312
313        return $api;
314    }
315
316    /**
317     * Authenticate a user for all next requests.
318     *
319     * @param string      $tokenOrLogin GitHub private token/username/client ID
320     * @param string|null $password     GitHub password/secret (optionally can contain $authMethod)
321     * @param string|null $authMethod   One of the AUTH_* class constants
322     *
323     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If no authentication method was given
324     *
325     * @return void
326     */
327    public function authenticate($tokenOrLogin, $password = null, $authMethod = null): void
328    {
329        if (null === $authMethod && (AuthMethod::JWT === $password || AuthMethod::ACCESS_TOKEN === $password)) {
330            $authMethod = $password;
331            $password = null;
332        }
333
334        if (null === $authMethod) {
335            throw new InvalidArgumentException('You need to specify authentication method!');
336        }
337
338        $this->getHttpClientBuilder()->removePlugin(Authentication::class);
339        $this->getHttpClientBuilder()->addPlugin(new Authentication($tokenOrLogin, $password, $authMethod));
340    }
341
342    /**
343     * Sets the URL of your GitHub Enterprise instance.
344     *
345     * @param string $enterpriseUrl URL of the API in the form of http(s)://hostname
346     *
347     * @return void
348     */
349    private function setEnterpriseUrl($enterpriseUrl): void
350    {
351        $builder = $this->getHttpClientBuilder();
352        $builder->removePlugin(Plugin\AddHostPlugin::class);
353        $builder->removePlugin(PathPrepend::class);
354
355        $builder->addPlugin(new Plugin\AddHostPlugin(Psr17FactoryDiscovery::findUriFactory()->createUri($enterpriseUrl)));
356
357        // For GHE, v4 API endpoint is at `api/graphql` so we don't want to add the version number
358        // For earlier versions add the version number after /api
359        if ($this->getApiVersion() === 'v4') {
360            $builder->addPlugin(new PathPrepend('/api'));
361        } else {
362            $builder->addPlugin(new PathPrepend(sprintf('/api/%s', $this->getApiVersion())));
363        }
364    }
365
366    /**
367     * @return string
368     */
369    public function getApiVersion(): string
370    {
371        return $this->apiVersion;
372    }
373
374    /**
375     * Add a cache plugin to cache responses locally.
376     *
377     * @param CacheItemPoolInterface $cachePool
378     * @param array                  $config
379     *
380     * @return void
381     */
382    public function addCache(CacheItemPoolInterface $cachePool, array $config = []): void
383    {
384        $this->getHttpClientBuilder()->addCache($cachePool, $config);
385    }
386
387    /**
388     * Remove the cache plugin.
389     *
390     * @return void
391     */
392    public function removeCache(): void
393    {
394        $this->getHttpClientBuilder()->removeCache();
395    }
396
397    /**
398     * @param string $name
399     * @param array  $args
400     *
401     * @return AbstractApi
402     */
403    public function __call($name, $args): AbstractApi
404    {
405        try {
406            return $this->api($name);
407        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
408            throw new BadMethodCallException(sprintf('Undefined method called: "%s"', $name));
409        }
410    }
411
412    /**
413     * @return null|\Psr\Http\Message\ResponseInterface
414     */
415    public function getLastResponse(): ?ResponseInterface
416    {
417        return $this->responseHistory->getLastResponse();
418    }
419
420    /**
421     * @return HttpMethodsClientInterface
422     */
423    public function getHttpClient(): HttpMethodsClientInterface
424    {
425        return $this->getHttpClientBuilder()->getHttpClient();
426    }
427
428    /**
429     * @return Builder
430     */
431    protected function getHttpClientBuilder(): Builder
432    {
433        return $this->httpClientBuilder;
434    }
435}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable

Generated by php-code-coverage 11.0.9 using PHP 8.4.16 and PHPUnit 11.5.11 at Fri Apr 10 15:27:13 UTC 2026.
